seo_description: Current time in Kathmandu, Nepal. Nepal Time (NPT, UTC+5:45) year-round — no DST. One of the world's few 45-minute offset time zones. Live clock.

faq.question: What time is it in Kathmandu right now?
faq.answer: Kathmandu, Nepal uses Nepal Time (NPT, UTC+5:45) year-round. Nepal does not observe Daylight Saving Time. The IANA identifier is Asia/Kathmandu. Nepal Time is one of the world's few time zones with a 45-minute offset — it is 15 minutes ahead of India (IST, UTC+5:30) and 15 minutes behind Bangladesh (BST, UTC+6). The live clock above shows the current Kathmandu time.

faq.question: What time zone is Kathmandu in?
faq.answer: Kathmandu, Nepal is in the Nepal Time zone (NPT, UTC+5:45) year-round. The IANA identifier is Asia/Kathmandu. Nepal adopted the +5:45 offset to distinguish itself from its large neighbors — India at UTC+5:30 and China at UTC+8. The 45-minute offset is shared by only a handful of territories globally and makes Nepal unique among South Asian nations.

faq.question: Does Kathmandu observe daylight saving time?
faq.answer: No. Kathmandu and Nepal do not observe Daylight Saving Time. Nepal uses NPT (UTC+5:45) permanently year-round. Nepal's location in South Asia, near the equator, provides relatively consistent daylight hours throughout the year, making DST unnecessary.

faq.question: What is the time difference between Kathmandu and Delhi?
faq.answer: Kathmandu (NPT, UTC+5:45) is 15 minutes ahead of Delhi (IST, UTC+5:30). This unusual 15-minute gap is consistent year-round as neither Nepal nor India observes Daylight Saving Time.

faq.question: What is the time difference between Kathmandu and London?
faq.answer: Kathmandu (NPT, UTC+5:45) is 5 hours and 45 minutes ahead of London (GMT, UTC+0) in winter. During British Summer Time (BST, UTC+1), Kathmandu is 4 hours and 45 minutes ahead of London. Nepal does not observe DST.

faq.question: What is the time difference between Kathmandu and New York?
faq.answer: Kathmandu (NPT, UTC+5:45) is 10 hours and 45 minutes ahead of New York (EST, UTC-5) in winter. During US DST (EDT, UTC-4), Kathmandu is 9 hours and 45 minutes ahead of New York. Nepal does not observe DST.

faq.question: What are typical business hours in Kathmandu?
faq.answer: Standard business hours in Kathmandu are 10:00 AM to 5:00 PM NPT, Sunday through Friday (Friday is the weekend start and Saturday is the official day off). Government offices open at 10:00 AM. Kathmandu is Nepal's capital and largest city, the gateway for Himalayan trekking and Mount Everest expeditions. The city is a major tourism hub and home to Tribhuvan International Airport, Nepal's only international airport.
